subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Threshold of the Blessed Beauty! Thy letter dated 22 June 1909 was received. Praise be to God that correspondence [3.5s]... ...As to Mr. Robert [Turner], the news of his ascension saddened the hearts. He was in truth most devoted
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه جمال مبارک نامه مورخ به ۲۲ جون ۱۹۰۹ واصل گردید الحمد لله مکاتیب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences, @race unity; racial issues
